title: Last Substring in Lexicographical Order
titleCn: 按字典序排在最后的子串

testcases.input: s = "abab" Output: "bab" Explanation: The substrings are ["a", "ab", "aba", "abab", "b", "ba", "bab"]. The lexicographically maximum substring is "bab".
testcases.expectedOutput: "bab" Explanation: The substrings are ["a", "ab", "aba", "abab", "b", "ba", "bab"]. The lexicographically maximum substring is "bab".
